untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'excess_kurtosis' and 'skew' indicators which are not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. These are statistical measures not provided by the available indicator set. Volatility threshold interpreted as hvol_20 with a nominal minimum, but the exact 'minimum level' cannot be determined without author clarification.
translation_notes: The signal references excess kurtosis and skew—advanced statistical indicators not available in the standard indicator set. These would typically require custom calculation of the fourth and third moments of returns. Volatility was approximated with hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) using a conservative minimum threshold of 0.02 (2%). Exit condition reversed from entry (kurtosis crosses above 0) as original source indicated AUTHOR_SILENT.
